title: Retry failed deployment build

requirements.text: Fix the 'Expected v3 response body' Candid interface mismatch error that occurs when a user attempts to create a blog post, so that blog post creation completes successfully without errors.
acceptanceCriteria: A logged-in user can submit the Create Blog Post form without receiving an 'Expected v3 response body' error.
The backend Candid interface for creating a blog post matches what the frontend sends.
The created post appears in the admin posts list after successful submission.
Editing an existing blog post also completes without a Candid mismatch error.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Keep all backend logic within the single main actor in backend/main.mo.
nonGoals: Adding new blog post fields or changing the data model beyond what is needed to fix the Candid mismatch.
